prompt: Add real-time notifications when someone replies in the community.
method: constitution-bound live-chat simulation (same Nexus packs/contracts/DNA weighting; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unavailable in eval VM)
reply:
Implementation plan:

1. Persist notifications in postgres (read/unread) — inbox works without a live socket.
2. Fan-out on reply create with idempotent delivery keys.
3. Preference flags API encoding quiet defaults.
4. Transport decision (SSE vs WS) with reconnect/backoff documented — can follow the inbox slice.
5. Smallest ship: persist + poll first; realtime second.

Acceptance: quiet prefs honored; no duplicate alerts; failure modes don’t drop unread state.
